news.title: Remembering Jon Miskowski, PBS Wisconsin’s emeritus director of television
news.summary_en: Miskowski leaves a legacy of statewide community focus and programmatic vision that advanced PBS Wisconsin’s prominence nationally in education, innovation and fundraising.

news.title: RISE-THRIVE lead and headquarters announced
news.summary_en: Michal Engelman will lead the RISE-THRIVE Collaboration Headquarters in its mission to bring together researchers working at the forefront of two distinct but related research areas — immunology and healthspan.

news.title: With deep appreciation and immense gratitude, farewell
news.summary_en: Chancellor Jennifer Mnookin offers a parting note as the academic year and her time at UW–Madison comes to a close.

news.title: Going above and beyond to help students succeed
news.summary_en: The 2026 Awards for Mentoring Undergraduates recognize outstanding contributions to student growth from the classroom to the lab.

news.title: UW–Madison launches search for next director of athletics
news.summary_en: The process is being initiated by incoming interim Chancellor Eric Wilcots.

news.title: Professor Emeritus John Ralph elected to National Academy of Sciences
news.summary_en: The honor recognizes his pioneering work to understand the biochemistry of an important binding compound in plants.

news.title: Universities of Wisconsin Presidential Search Committee, interim president named
news.summary_en: Amy B. Bogost, president of the UW System Board of Regents, has appointed a 25-member presidential search committee to help identify the next Universities of Wisconsin president. Bogost appointed Renée Wachter as the interim president of the Universities of Wisconsin.
